title: OGI / Organigram Global Inc. Stock Forecast and Analyst Estimates
text: Organigram Global Inc (OGI) Analyst Expectations and Consensus Estimates. Earnings Estimates: The consensus EPS estimate for the next earnings is -0.01 USD and the consensus revenue estimate is 71.32M USD. The next earnings revenue estimate has been revised downward by 6.87% in the past 3 months. Analyst Ratings: 9 Wall Street analysts provided a forecast for the next 12 months for OGI, with a buy percentage consensus at 78. Price Targets: The average price target is 2.54 USD, which implies a price increase of 129.1% is expected in the next year compared to the current price of 1.11. The average price target has been revised upward by 1.95% in the past 3 months. 2026 Outlook: New consensus forecast suggests the company will make a profit of CA$2.00m in 2026, with earnings growth of 141% required to achieve expected profit on schedule. Market Sentiment: The consensus shows mixed sentiment with analysts expecting profitability improvement but with downward revenue revisions recently.
